LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Whitespring försvar
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Whitespring krigslösningar
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Bygg presidentinredning som Whitespring-mattor, speglar, pampiga stolar, Whitespring-plattor, kandelabrar och mer.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: presidentens dekor
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Konstruera en skrivbordsstol för presidenten som passar seniora Whitespring-tjänstemän och deras ceremoniella uppgifter.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: presidentens skrivbordsstol
